purpose: load_graphml's happy path over the committed fixture harness/fixtures/chain-ab.graphml: the file is parsed into a DiGraph (pyreason.py:577) and, with graph_attribute_parsing at its default True, special=1 and rel=1 are grounded into 'graph-attribute-fact' facts (pyreason.py:580-581, graphml_parser.py:27-94), so 'derived(y) <-1 special(x), rel(x,y)' derives derived(B) at t=1 and t=2 (get_time 3; trace-node carries the two Rule rows grounding [A] and [[A,B]]); nodes-special/edges-rel frames stay empty under default-False save_graph_attributes_to_trace, and the knob readback pins graph_attribute_parsing True. Every probe shared with the inline-graph twin graph-attr-parsing-on digest-equals it (verified at authoring against that case's stored artifact — the harness judges each case in isolation), pinning the graphml path and the inline load_graph path to the same grounding on this graph — the happy-basic class; static_graph_facts' default-True stamping (pyreason.py:581) is in effect here but is cased as an interaction by the static-graph-facts pair over load_graph.
